headline: Is W.W. Grainger (GWW) One of the Top 11 Dividend Kings to Buy for Safe Dividend Growth?
summary: With a 5-Year Average Dividend Growth Rate of 8.34%, W.W. Grainger, Inc. (NYSE:GWW) is included among the Top 11 Dividend Kings to Buy for Safe Dividend Growth. On June 16, DA Davidson initiated coverage of W.W. Grainger, Inc. (NYSE:GWW) with a Neutral rating and a $1,250 price target. The firm said the company is expected to […]
